mentions.note: British AI software company; pre-announced revenue, stock up 80% YTD, then announced $250M secondary offering at 13% discount; stock crashed 23% same day, erasing all recent gains—cautionary secondary offering example.
Raised $250M at $4/share discount; stock plunged 23% post-announcement, erasing 80% YTD gains—textbook secondary offering sell-off.
